data.title: Arm Holdings Stock Plunges After Q4 Results: Here's Why
data.description: Arm Holdings releases its fourth-quarter results after Wednesday's closing bell. Here's a look at the details from the report.

data.title: Carvana Q1 Earnings: Revenue, EPS Beat Estimates As Vehicles Sales Jump 46%, Company Remains On Track For 'Significant Growth' In FY25
data.description: Carvana reports first-quarter revenue of $4.23 billion, beating the consensus estimate of $3.98 billion. The company reports first-quarter earnings of $1.51 per share, smashing analyst estimates of 60 cents per share.

data.title: Epilepsy-Focused Bright Minds Biosciences A High-Risk, High-Reward Play, Analyst Initiates With Over 150% Stock Upside
data.description: Chardan initiates Bright Minds with a Buy rating, citing over $1 billion sales potential for epilepsy drug BMB-101 despite limited clinical data.
